reviews.comment:
Lamento que no te permitan estar en el area de esparcimiento y ya no existe la confiteria yningun otro servicio. Lo unico que se puede hacer es cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
I'm sorry you're not allowed in the recreation area, and the cafeteria and other services are no longer available. The only thing you can do is fill up with gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlMnViTTNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Parea  comprar algo para almorzar.
Me pedí algo muy difícil de cocinar.
Un hamburguesa BIEN COCIDA, lo cual generó la siguiente pregunta de la chica..... que sería bien Cocida?  Ante mi sorpresa le dije.... que no esté cruda!!!! Lo cual dije con cierto miedo, por temor a estar pidiendo algo demasiado complicado de hacer. 🤷
Resultado me lleve una hamburguesa fría de heladera "LITERALMENTE" por desgracia subí al auto y salí por panamericana mientras la abría. Así que no pude reclamar.
Pero bueno mala atención y pala cocina, recomendación 0 !!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
I went to buy something for lunch.
I ordered something very difficult to cook.
A WELL-COOKED hamburger, which prompted the girl to ask... what did "well-cooked" mean? To my surprise, I replied... that it shouldn't be raw! I said this with some trepidation, afraid I was ordering something too complicated to make. 🤷 The result? I got a cold hamburger straight from the fridge, "LITERALLY." Unfortunately, I got in my car and drove off on the Pan-American Highway while I was opening it. So I couldn't complain.
But anyway, bad service and terrible food, zero recommendation!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1eTd5aVFnEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
